strategic_objective: Clarify whether the zero entropy and dominant ratio of 1.0 in Destination Port for the DDoS class represent a fixed attack vector or a dataset artifact, and assess how this distributional difference influences model reliance.
key_checks: Compare Destination Port distribution entropy and dominant ratio across classes
Assess stability of Destination Port distribution over time segments
Evaluate shortcut-like predictive leverage of Destination Port in isolation
Examine correlation of Destination Port with other features in DDoS class
success_criteria: Evidence supports either a fixed attack vector or dataset artifact explanation
Clear indication of whether model reliance on Destination Port is shortcut-like or robust
Identification of distributional stability or variability across time
